message:
style(index): apply rustfmt to lib.rs and two_tier.rs

Apply standard rustfmt formatting throughout the index crate to improve
code consistency and readability:

- lib.rs: Reflow long method chains (.retain, .map_err closures,
  .rewrite_index call) to stay within the line-length limit. Remove
  trailing whitespace on blank lines. Expand multi-line return
  expression in get_embedding_by_doc_hash for clarity.

- two_tier.rs: Reformat sort_by closure in search to multi-line for
  readability. Wrap long assignment in quality scoring. Expand inline
  VectorHit struct literals in tests to one-field-per-line format,
  matching the project's preferred test style. Collapse single-element
  vec! macros to a more compact form.

No behavioral changes -- purely cosmetic formatting to satisfy rustfmt
and improve diff readability for future changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
